mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `purchase` (bill_no, supplier_id, warehouse_id, total_amount, status, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{billNo}, #{supplierId}, #{warehouseId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, s.name AS supplier_name FROM `purchase` p LEFT JOIN supplier s ON p.supplier_id = s.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.*, s.name AS supplier_name FROM `purchase` p LEFT JOIN supplier s ON p.supplier_id = s.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM `purchase_inbound` i WHERE i.purchase_id = p.id) ORDER BY p.id DESC
